'''hajoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyberanarchy|cyberanarchy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyberanarchy|cyberanarchy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hajoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæjereth|hæjereth]] || [[word:hæjerej|hæjerej]] || [[word:hæjeresh|hæjeresh]] || [[word:hæjere|hæjere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hajojoroth|hajojoroth]] || [[word:hajojoroj|hajojoroj]] || [[word:hajojorosh|hajojorosh]] || [[word:hajojoro|hajojoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hajoroth|hajoroth]] || [[word:hajoroj|hajoroj]] || [[word:hajorosh|hajorosh]] || [[word:hajoro|hajoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hajofrofth|hajofrofth]] || [[word:hajofrofj|hajofrofj]] || [[word:hajofrofsh|hajofrofsh]] || [[word:hajofrof|hajofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hajorotho|hajorotho]] || [[word:hajorojo|hajorojo]] || [[word:hajorosho|hajorosho]] || [[word:hajoroko|hajoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hajoroth|hajoroth]] || [[word:hajoroj|hajoroj]] || [[word:hajorosh|hajorosh]] || [[word:hajoro|hajoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hajorothol|hajorothol]] || [[word:hajorojol|hajorojol]] || [[word:hajoroshol|hajoroshol]] || [[word:hajorokol|hajorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hajoroothotho|hajoroothotho]] || [[word:hajoroojojo|hajoroojojo]] || [[word:hajorooshosho|hajorooshosho]] || [[word:hajorooko|hajorooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hajorothon|hajorothon]] || [[word:hajorojon|hajorojon]] || [[word:hajoroshon|hajoroshon]] || [[word:hajorokon|hajorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hajorothooro|hajorothooro]] || [[word:hajorojooro|hajorojooro]] || [[word:hajoroshooro|hajoroshooro]] || [[word:hajorokooro|hajorokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
